particulars.description: All that and those lands comprised in a lease of part of folio 35476 county antrim dated 9 december 2020 between (1) invest northern ireland and (2) a s f engineering limited.

Agreement for lease dated 7 june 2019 and made between (1) invest northern ireland and (2) asf engineering limited over part of the registered land comprised in folio numbers 35476 county antrim which premises are situate at woodside road east industrial estate, ballymena, co. Antrim pursuant to which the terms of a 999 year lease were agreed to be granted from invest northern ireland to asf engineering limited in respect of the premises at woodside road east industrial estate, ballymena, co. Antrim which are comprised as part of folio 35476 co. Antrim.
The undertaking of the company and all its property whatsoever and wheresoever both present and future including its uncalled capital for the time being...see image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
